---
title: "Research"
---

<section class="page-hero" aria-labelledby="research-title">
<div class="site-shell narrow-copy">
<p class="eyebrow">Research</p>
<h1 id="research-title">Analytical methods that make complex biomedical data usable.</h1>
<p class="page-lede">This site outlines the public areas reflected in the lab's current software portfolio.</p>
</div>
</section>

<section class="section" aria-labelledby="focus-areas">
<div class="site-shell">
<div class="section-heading">
<p class="eyebrow">Focus areas</p>
<h2 id="focus-areas">Current public themes</h2>
</div>
<div class="research-list">
<article class="research-item">
<p class="research-number">01</p>
<div>
<h3>Cytokine data science</h3>
<p>Current tools support biologically informed quality control, data transformation decisions, exploratory analysis, and multivariate approaches for cytokine datasets.</p>
</div>
</article>
<article class="research-item">
<p class="research-number">02</p>
<div>
<h3>Continuous glucose monitoring</h3>
<p>Current projects address CGM data quality, missing-data imputation, clinically relevant metrics, visualization, and reproducible exports.</p>
</div>
</article>
<article class="research-item">
<p class="research-number">03</p>
<div>
<h3>Accessible statistical tools</h3>
<p>R packages and Shiny applications translate complex workflows into forms that can be used by a broader research community.</p>
</div>
</article>
</div>
</div>
</section>
